title: HEY! Villager that is my bed!
description: Stops villagers from using your own bed!
body: [![Download](https://img.shields.io/badge/⬇️%20Download-darkgreen?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hey!-villager-that-is-my-bed!#download) [![Patreon](https://img.shields.io/badge/❤️%20Support%20on%20Patreon%20And%20Unlock%20PEarly%20Access%20builds-ff424d?style=for-the-badge)](https://patreon.com/McDonaldsWIFI_ig?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink) The main purpose of HEY! Villager that's my bed is **to prevent villagers from being annoying and surround your bed and also sleep on it.** For now the follwing features are: - **Wake villagers as soon as they start sleeping on your bed, so no checks every tick (good for potato pcs such as mine :);** - **Make them scared of your bed (yeah really) and memory wipe so that they search for another one (that is some sci-fi stuff)** It is just a simple lightweight mod that aims to make your life easier! ![villager getting caught](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nlBF67Tv/images/e61a3b33bddd09452e4957ecdd790726fe240424.png) **The resource pack used in the screenshot is [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and the cat model is from [https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-cats/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-cats/versions)** **If you don't mind I would be super grateful if you could give me a donation! No pressure tough just your download makes my day 1000x better :)**
